name: Vape X200
subtitle: 5 flavors available
description: The Vape X200 is the ideal choice for those seeking intense flavor and durability. With its long-lasting battery, it offers up to 2000 puffs of pure flavor.

name: Vape X300
subtitle: 8 flavors available
description: The Vape X300 offers more autonomy and a larger selection of flavors for users who want a compact device with consistent performance.

name: Vape Pro
subtitle: 10 flavors available
description: The Vape Pro combines a stronger battery, a refined design and premium flavors for a more complete experience.
